Include a triple-lens camera cutout at the upper left, beveled clear edges, reflective plastic, tiny gold rivets, red mechanical side panels, and printed gold text reading “PRINCIPALITY OF ZEON” near the top, “CHAR AZNABLE,” “THE RED COMET,” and Japanese red text “赤い彗星” near the bottom, plus a small gold emblem. Attach a luxury dangling accessory from the left side: a gold chain, a gold faction-style emblem charm, a red fabric strap with gold text “CHAR AZNABLE” and chevron marks, and a small metallic helmet charm. To the right, place a second iPhone standing behind it with a black glass front and red metallic frame, showing a lock screen at 10:30, Tuesday, May 20, with a blurred matching character wallpaper, small lock icon, status icons, bottom camera icon, and the label “RED COMET.” Use dramatic warm studio lighting, shallow depth of field, premium macro product photography, realistic reflections, leather texture, cinematic shadows, and a dark collector’s desk background. The visible composition contains exactly 2 phones and exactly 4 dangling accessory elements: gold chain, gold emblem charm, red name strap, and small helmet charm. Customize the case theme as {argument name="case theme" default="red ace pilot mecha armor"}, the main printed name as {argument name="character name" default="CHAR AZNABLE"}, the faction title as {argument name="faction title" default="PRINCIPALITY OF ZEON"}, the lock screen time as {argument name="lock screen time" default="10:30"}, and the phone case color palette as {argument name="color palette" default="metallic red, black, white, and gold"}. Avoid extra phones, extra charms, watermarks, distorted unreadable typography, or cartoon rendering.
